rationale: Chemical & Bioengineering L4 splits each L3 by named process, biotech platform, drug-delivery format, or tissue engineering technique. 1-3 L4 per L3.

leaves.name: Advanced Process Control
leaves.tagline: Advanced process control, MPC for chem processes, plant-wide control.

leaves.name: Process Network Design
leaves.tagline: Process network design, integrated bio-chem processes, multi-product plant design.

leaves.name: Supply Chain Optimization (Chem)
leaves.tagline: Supply chain optimization in chemicals, multi-period chemical supply chain planning.

leaves.name: Soft Sensors & Plant Digital Twins
leaves.tagline: Soft sensors, ML-enabled process operations, plant digital twins.

leaves.name: Multi-Phase Reactor Modeling
leaves.tagline: Multi-phase reactor modeling, CFD-PBM, reactor scale-up.

leaves.name: Microreactor & Flow Chem Engineering
leaves.tagline: Microreactor engineering, continuous flow chemistry at scale.

leaves.name: Industrial Catalyst Engineering
leaves.tagline: Catalyst engineering for industry, supports + shaping, deactivation engineering.

leaves.name: Microkinetic Modeling
leaves.tagline: Microkinetic modeling, industrial mechanism studies, DFT-informed kinetics.

leaves.name: Gas Separation Membranes
leaves.tagline: Gas separation membranes, MOF-membranes, CO2/N2 separation.

leaves.name: Water Treatment Membranes
leaves.tagline: Water treatment membranes, desalination membranes, low-fouling membranes.

leaves.name: Crystallization Engineering
leaves.tagline: Crystallization engineering, polymorph control, continuous crystallization.

leaves.name: Adsorption Process Design
leaves.tagline: Adsorption process design, PSA + TSA process design, sorbent screening.

leaves.name: Reactive Distillation
leaves.tagline: Reactive distillation, process intensification with reactive separations.

leaves.name: Biopharma Chromatography
leaves.tagline: Biopharma chromatography, capture-polish design, continuous chromatography.

leaves.name: Downstream Bioprocessing
leaves.tagline: Downstream bioprocessing, continuous processing of biologics, virus filtration.

leaves.name: Mass Transfer in Bio/Chemical Systems
leaves.tagline: Mass transfer in bio + chemical systems, multi-phase transport, mixing in bioreactors.

leaves.name: Bioreactor Scale-Up
leaves.tagline: Bioreactor scale-up, perfusion bioreactors, fermentation process control.

leaves.name: Enzyme Immobilization
leaves.tagline: Enzyme immobilization, enzyme reactors, immobilized biocatalysis.

leaves.name: CHO/HEK Bioprocess
leaves.tagline: CHO/HEK cell culture engineering, perfusion biomanufacturing for biologics.

leaves.name: Viral Vector Bioprocess
leaves.tagline: Viral vector bioprocess (AAV, lentivirus), bioprocess for gene therapy.

leaves.name: Cell-Free Protein Synthesis
leaves.tagline: Cell-free protein synthesis, cell-free synthetic biology applied, distributed biomanufacturing.

leaves.name: Microbial Cell Factories
leaves.tagline: Engineered microbial cell factories, metabolic engineering for production at scale.

leaves.name: Yeast Bioproduction
leaves.tagline: Yeast bioproduction, S. cerevisiae + non-conventional yeasts for production.

leaves.name: Engineered Cell Therapy Chassis
leaves.tagline: Engineered cell therapy chassis, applied gene circuits for therapeutics.

leaves.name: Genome-Scale Metabolic Models
leaves.tagline: Genome-scale metabolic models, computer-aided strain design, FBA-driven design.

leaves.name: Ionizable Lipid LNP Design
leaves.tagline: Ionizable lipid design, LNP delivery, mRNA delivery engineering, organ-targeted LNPs.

leaves.name: Targeted Delivery & ADCs
leaves.tagline: Targeted delivery, ADCs from engineering angle, antibody-conjugated nanocarriers.

leaves.name: Depot Systems & Controlled Release
leaves.tagline: Depot systems, long-acting injectables, controlled release engineering.

leaves.name: Oral Biopharmaceutics
leaves.tagline: Oral biopharmaceutics, amorphous solid dispersions, lipid-based oral delivery.

leaves.name: Inhalation & Pulmonary Delivery
leaves.tagline: Inhalation + pulmonary delivery, dry powder inhalers, inhaled biologics.

leaves.name: Polymeric Micelles (Pharma)
leaves.tagline: Polymeric micelles for pharma, polymer-based delivery, polymeric nanoparticle engineering.

leaves.name: Hydrogel & Injectable Delivery
leaves.tagline: Hydrogel delivery, injectable in-situ-forming hydrogel for drug delivery.

leaves.name: Bone & Cartilage Scaffolds
leaves.tagline: Bone + cartilage scaffolds, 3D-printed scaffolds for orthopedic tissue engineering.

leaves.name: Vascularized Scaffolds
leaves.tagline: Vascularized scaffolds, perfusable engineered tissue, organ-scale vascular networks.

leaves.name: Patient-Derived Organoid Platforms
leaves.tagline: Patient-derived organoid platforms, organoid screening, automated organoid culture.

leaves.name: Multi-Organ MPS / Body-on-Chip
leaves.tagline: Multi-organ microphysiological systems, body-on-chip, integrated organ-on-chip platforms.

leaves.name: Vascularized Bioprinting
leaves.tagline: Vascularized 3D bioprinting, bioink design for vasculature, sacrificial inks for vascular networks.

leaves.name: High-Resolution Bioprinting
leaves.tagline: High-resolution bioprinting, sub-cellular print resolution, two-photon bioprinting.

leaves.name: Neural Implant Engineering
leaves.tagline: Neural implant engineering, soft neural implants, integration with bioelectronics.

leaves.name: Surgical Robot Integration
leaves.tagline: Surgical robot integration, MIS robots, image-guided + haptic surgical robots.

leaves.name: POC Microfluidic Diagnostics
leaves.tagline: POC microfluidic diagnostics, lateral flow + nucleic acid POC, biosensor integration.

leaves.name: MBR + AOP for Wastewater
leaves.tagline: MBR + AOP for wastewater, nutrient recovery, sustainable WWTP design.

leaves.name: Direct Air Capture Engineering
leaves.tagline: Direct air capture engineering, sorbent + solvent DAC, integrated DAC process design.

leaves.name: CO2 Utilization Process Engineering
leaves.tagline: CO2 utilization process engineering, CO2-to-fuel process design, mineralization.

leaves.name: Circular Chemistry Process Engineering
leaves.tagline: Circular chem-eng process design, plastic recycling process engineering.

leaves.name: Electrolyzer Process Engineering
leaves.tagline: Electrolyzer process engineering, PEM + AEM water electrolysis at scale.

leaves.name: Biofuel & E-Fuel Process Engineering
leaves.tagline: Biofuel process engineering, e-fuels (e-methanol, e-SAF), syngas-to-fuels.

leaves.name: CFD for Chemical Processes
leaves.tagline: CFD for chemical processes, reacting CFD, CFD-PBM for crystallizers + reactors.

leaves.name: ML for Chemical Engineering
leaves.tagline: ML for chemical engineering, surrogate models for unit operations, ML-enabled process control.

uncovered_concerns: Some L3 leaves get 1 L4 because the L3 community is already at the working-unit level.
Pharmaceutical engineering papers fold across LNP + oral + inhalation + nanocarrier L4 leaves.
